title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Merck India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Merck India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Merck India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India Ventures Solutions:
Merck India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India Ventures Solutions!
